chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-948 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case(Priority) 1.For orders on o/objections 2.For hearing of CMA 3985/25 3.For hearing of main case 09-07-2025 Mr. Sohail Ahmed Khoso, Advocate for petitioner. M/s Zulfiqar Ali Naich, AAG and Gulzar Ahmed Malano, APG a/w ASI Ghulam Qadir I.O of the Case. ****** Pursuant to directions contained under order dated 02.07.2025, I.O files statement dated 09.07.2025, taken on record. Learned AAG and APG submit that investigation has been completed and interim challan has been submitted by the I.O; therefore purpose of this petition in view of dicta laid down by the Hon’ble Supreme Court in case of Director General, Anti-Corruption Establishment Lahore v. Muhammad Akram Khan (PLD 2013 SC 401) has been served and seeks disposal of instant petition. Learned counsel for petitioner when confronted with above legal position submits that petitioner may be allowed to file proper application before the trial Court if so advised, which too is not opposed by other side. Order accordingly. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
